name: starbound-vulkan-dev
description: Local automation and workflow helpers for Vulkan-first OpenStarbound development.

interface.shortDescription: Vulkan build and run helpers for OpenStarbound.
interface.longDescription: Provides a local plugin surface for Vulkan-first OpenStarbound development workflows, including dependency bootstrap, validation checks, and renderer launch commands.
defaultPrompt: Set up this machine for OpenStarbound Vulkan development and verify toolchain health.
Install VS Code extensions and Codex skill assets for this workspace.
Build using the linux-vulkan-dev preset and run the client on Vulkan.
Diagnose Vulkan swapchain startup failures and propose concrete fixes.
